title: German Gratin with Green Curds
description: A creamy, comforting side dish that combines the flavors of Germany with the freshness of green curds.
instructions: Peel and slice the potatoes thinly.
In a separate bowl, mix together the grated curds and German butter until well combined.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Spread half of the curd mixture over the potatoes.
Sprinkle half of the grated cheese over the curds.
Repeat the layers: potatoes, curds, and cheese.
Dust the top with flour and dot with butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
